entries.name: Weather Overlay
entries.summary: A demo third-party sidecar that overlays local weather on the wall.
entries.description: Illustrates a community catalog entry: a sidecar plugin published by a third party and listed in a signed remote registry. Install registers it at the base URL you run it on.

entries.name: Advanced Analytics
entries.summary: A demo commercial add-on (compiled module) shown as a Contact CTA.
entries.description: Illustrates a proprietary catalog entry: a compiled module that is not runtime-installable. The store shows availability + a contact link rather than an install button.
